flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northwest State Community College fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (27.7% → 21.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwest State Community College fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.9k → $3.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northwest State Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (966 → 1.1k).
